About.title: ABOUT ME
About.role: ROLE: Fullstack developer. Scope: Web apps & services.
About.e2e: END-TO-END: MVP, SaaS, admin panels. 3rd-party integrations (AMO CRM, YooKassa, Robokassa).
About.frontend: FRONTEND: SPA/SSR. Complex UI, WebGL/3D integration (react-three-fiber), animations.
About.backend: BACKEND: API design, DB schema. Async workers (payment webhooks, mailing, parsing).
